methods.method_name: Sample Preparation for δ18O and Alkenone Analysis
methods.description: Process for preparing sediment core samples for δ18O isotope analysis and alkenone measurements to study past climate conditions.

steps.description: Core MD03-2628 was sampled at every 20 cm interval for the δ18O analysis and for the UK37 determination.
steps.searchable_summary: sample core at 20 cm intervals for isotope and alkenone analysis

steps.description: Samples for δ18O measurements were wet-sieved for the <63 µm, 63-150 µm, and >150 µm fractions and dried in an oven at 50°C.
steps.searchable_summary: wet-sieve samples and dry at 50°C for δ18O analysis

steps.description: G. ruber (250-355 µm) was hand-picked from the >150 µm fraction.
steps.searchable_summary: hand-pick G. ruber from sieved samples

steps.description: Samples for the alkenone analysis were freeze-dried and ground in a mortar.
steps.searchable_summary: freeze-dry and grind samples for alkenone analysis

methods.description: Procedure for measuring δ18O isotopes using a mass spectrometer to analyze past climate conditions.

steps.description: δ18O measurements were performed on five to ten individuals of G. ruber using a Finnigan Delta Advantage mass spectrometer directly coupled to an automatic carbonate preparation device (Kiel Device III).
steps.searchable_summary: perform δ18O measurements using mass spectrometer

steps.description: Analytical precision of the method was controlled with the regular standard analyses of NBS19 and was better than 0.04‰ for δ18O VPDB (1σ; n = 169).
steps.searchable_summary: validate δ18O measurement precision with standard analyses

steps.description: The reproducibility of this approach was tested using replicate measurements of G. ruber from the same level at different depths in the core, and showed no significant shift.
steps.searchable_summary: test reproducibility of δ18O measurements with replicates

methods.description: Procedure for measuring C37 alkenones and calculating sea surface temperatures (SST) using the UK37 index.

steps.description: The analytical procedure and the extraction method for the C37 alkenone measurements are fully described in Sonzogni et al. (1997).
steps.searchable_summary: perform C37 alkenone measurements as per Sonzogni et al. (1997)

steps.description: The quality of the measurements carried out at CEREGE was confirmed by an international intercalibration study (Rosell-Melé et al., 2001).
steps.searchable_summary: validate alkenone measurement quality with intercalibration study

steps.description: SSTs were calculated with the UK37 index using the calibrations of Sonzogni et al. (1997) and Conte et al. (2006).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate SST using UK37 index and calibrations
